title: How to Create QR Codes in GoHighLevel — Agency Marketing
description: Learn how Indian agencies use GoHighLevel to create, customize, and track QR codes for WhatsApp campaigns. Step-by-step guide with Razorpay integration & ROI...
html_content:
🚀 Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — No credit card required. Start your free trial here →

Stop Losing Leads: Why Indian Agencies Need QR Codes (But Not the Way You Think)

You're managing campaigns across 8-10 clients. Your team is stretched thin. One designer is handling QR codes in Canva, another is tracking clicks in Google Sheets, and your copywriter is manually entering data into three different platforms. Meanwhile, clients are asking why their offline campaigns aren't connecting to their WhatsApp sequences.

This is the reality for most digital marketing agencies in Mumbai, Bangalore, and Delhi right now.

Here's the painful truth: Most Indian agencies are still using fragmented tools for QR code generation. They create codes in one platform, host landing pages in another, set up WhatsApp automation in a third, and track everything in a fourth. That's not just inefficient—it's leaving money on the table.

The agencies winning right now? They've consolidated everything into one system. They create QR codes, customize them with brand colors, link them to WhatsApp automations, and track every single scan—all without leaving their CRM.

That system is GoHighLevel. And in this guide, I'll show you exactly how to use it to stop managing multiple tools and start scaling your agency with the lean team you actually have.

The Problem: Why Your Current QR Code Workflow Is Costing You

Let's be specific. Your agency is managing a campaign for a fitness brand in Pune. You need:

  • A QR code for Instagram Stories → links to a landing page
  • A QR code for gym posters → links to a WhatsApp opt-in
  • A QR code for offline flyers → links to a Razorpay payment form

Using traditional tools, you'd spend 45 minutes creating and tracking these across 3-4 platforms. Using GoHighLevel? 15 minutes. Everything in one dashboard.

But it's not just about time savings. It's about data. When you fragment your tools, you lose visibility into the entire customer journey. You can't connect a QR code scan to a WhatsApp conversation to a Razorpay payment. Your clients don't see the ROI. Your team can't optimize campaigns in real-time.

How GoHighLevel Solves This (For Indian Agencies)

GoHighLevel is a CRM built for agencies. It does everything your client needs under one roof: landing pages, funnels, SMS/WhatsApp automation, payment processing, and now—QR code generation with full tracking and customization.

Here's what makes it powerful for Indian agencies specifically:

  • WhatsApp-First Automation — Not SMS. WhatsApp. That's where your customers actually are.
  • Razorpay & UPI Integration — Collect payments the way Indians prefer (no Stripe nonsense).
  • Multi-Client Management — Run campaigns for 10+ clients from one account, with separate tracking.
  • GST-Compliant Invoicing — Built in. No extra accounting tools.
  • Pricing That Makes Sense — ₹8,000/month (~$97) to start. Scale up as you grow.

Real Use Case: A Mumbai-Based Digital Agency

Let me give you a concrete example. Imagine you're running an agency in Mumbai with 3 team members managing 12 clients across e-commerce, fitness, and real estate.

Your e-commerce client (a fashion brand) launches a campaign:

  • Print QR codes on 5,000 shopping bags → Links to a landing page
  • Instagram Stories QR code → Links to a WhatsApp group
  • Website QR code → Links to a Razorpay checkout (quick repeat purchases)

With GoHighLevel:

Day 1: You create all three QR codes in the builder. Customize them with the brand's logo and colors (takes 10 minutes). Export as PNG/SVG for the printer.

Day 5: Campaign goes live. You're watching real-time scan data in your dashboard. The WhatsApp sequence is automatically sending welcome messages to everyone who scans.

Week 2: You see that the Instagram QR code is outperforming the bag QR code 3:1. You pivot budget and spend more on Stories ads. Because you have the data right there.

Week 4: You present the client with proof: 1,200 scans, 850 WhatsApp subscribers, 180 Razorpay transactions = ₹2,40,000 in revenue. ROI justified.

That's the power of a unified system.

Pricing: Why It Makes Sense for Your Agency

GoHighLevel has two plans worth considering:

  • Starter Plan: $97/month (~₹8,000/month) — Perfect for small agencies or testing. Includes unlimited contacts, landing pages, and QR codes.
  • Agency Plan: $297/month (~₹24,700/month) — Multiple sub-accounts (great for managing client campaigns), advanced automations, priority support, and white-label options.

Let's do the math. If you're currently paying for:

  • Zoho CRM: ₹2,500/month
  • Canva Pro: ₹1,000/month
  • Landing page builder: ₹3,000/month
  • WhatsApp API service: ₹2,000/month

Total: ₹8,500/month — You're already spending more than the Starter plan, and you're still missing integrations.

With GoHighLevel at ₹8,000/month, you get everything consolidated. Plus, you can onboard more clients because your team isn't juggling 4-5 platforms anymore.

How to Create and Track QR Codes in GoHighLevel

Step 1: Access the QR Code Builder

From your GoHighLevel dashboard, go to Tools → QR Code Generator. You'll see the builder interface.

Step 2: Choose Your Link Destination

Paste the URL you want the QR code to link to. This can be:

  • A landing page (built in GHL)
  • A WhatsApp group link
  • A payment form (Razorpay, PayU, UPI)
  • A contact form
  • A Calendly booking page

Step 3: Customize with Your Brand

This is where it gets fun. Add:

  • Brand colors (match your client's palette)
  • Logo in the center (their company logo)
  • Shape variations (rounded corners, dots, etc.)
  • Border and background

Step 4: Download and Deploy

Export as PNG (for digital), SVG (for print/scaling), or PDF. Share with your designer or print vendor. Done.

Step 5: Track Everything

Every scan is logged. You'll see:

  • Total scans per QR code
  • Conversion rate (scans → form submissions, WhatsApp joins, etc.)
  • Device type (mobile, desktop)
  • Geographic data (which cities are scanning most)
  • Time-based insights (when are users scanning?)

This is your proof of ROI. Your client sees actual numbers, not vanity metrics.

WhatsApp Automation: The Indian Agency Advantage

Here's what separates GoHighLevel from Zoho CRM (the competitor most Indian agencies know): QR code-to-WhatsApp workflows are seamless.

When someone scans a QR code that links to your WhatsApp group or automation sequence, GHL automatically:

  • Captures their contact info
  • Sends a welcome message
  • Enrolls them in your automation sequence
  • Tags them for segmentation

So a fitness brand in Hyderabad can scan a gym poster QR code and immediately receive a WhatsApp message: "Hey! Welcome to [Gym Name]. Here's your free trial access..." with a link to book a session. No manual follow-up. No lost leads.

FAQ: Common Questions from Indian Agencies

Q: Can I create QR codes for multiple clients in one account?

A: Yes. Use the Agency Plan ($297/month). Each client gets a separate sub-account with their own QR codes, landing pages, and automations. You manage it all from one dashboard.

Q: Is GoHighLevel GST-compliant for Indian businesses?

A: Yes. You'll pay GST on top of the monthly subscription. The invoicing dashboard supports Indian tax requirements.

Q: How do I integrate with Razorpay for QR code payments?

A: Create a payment form in GHL with Razorpay as your payment processor. Generate a QR code linking to that form. When someone scans and pays, the data flows directly into your CRM and accounting system.

Q: Can I white-label QR codes with my agency branding?

A: Not the QR code itself (that's just the code). But you can customize the landing page, WhatsApp message, and follow-up sequences to be 100% white-labeled for your client.

Q: What if my team has no technical experience?

A: The QR code builder is drag-and-drop. No coding required. That said, GoHighLevel offers a 30-day free trial so you can test everything before committing.

The Bottom Line: Consolidation Wins in 2025

Indian agencies that are scaling are doing one thing differently: they've consolidated their toolstack. No more CRM + landing page builder + email tool + payment processor + analytics platform.

GoHighLevel lets you do all of that—including QR code generation, customization, and tracking—in one platform.

For your small team in Bangalore or Pune managing 10+ clients, that's not just convenient. That's the difference between managing chaos and running an actual operation.

The best part? You can test it risk-free. Start your free 30-day GoHighLevel trial today. No credit card required. Create a few QR codes. Set up a WhatsApp automation. See the data come in real-time. Then decide if it's worth ₹8,000/month.

Spoiler: Your clients will ask why you didn't do this sooner.
